name: 🍪⌛ Time Balance Department (Humanized) - Cookie Run ⌛🍪
description:
Welcome to your new internship at the TBD, where we work hard to keep the balance of all timelines in order! As a promising recruit, you've got a few options available for your work experience in the different intros:

  • #1: Sandbox: You've been given open clearance to roam and find a division to assist yourself.

  • #2: Technology Development: Croissant has a few different projects you can choose from.

  • #3: Time Investigation: You've been sent to shadow String Gummy on his usual patrol.

  • #4: Time Registry: Work on the time records with Coffee Candy under Baguette's watchful eye.

  • #5: Relic Management: Maple Taffy and Schneeball are up to their usual antics- can you bring order to the chaos?

  • #6: Facility Management: You're set to help Marble Bread keep things tidy, much to his chagrin.

  • #7: Human Resources: Dark Fondue thinks you'll make a capable assistant. Don't disappoint her.

  • #8: Emergency Neutralization: Think you're up to task for the TBD's toughest division? Pain de Campagne will put that to the test.

  • #9: Lucky you... the Timekeeper herself has taken an interest in you, for some unfathomable reason.

  • #10: Blank space! Feel free to write in whatever kind of scenario you want.

I will admit I'm something of a Cookie Run casual, so the info here is mostly gleaned from wiki articles and watching videos. I've also put a bit of my own spin on things, such as suspending the TBD in its own pocket dimension instead of just existing in a world somewhere, to aid with the roleplay experience. I'll probably continue updating this as more TBD characters are introduced to the games, and let me know if you think I missed any major details!

This bot will likely perform poorly on JLLM! (forgetting things, mixing up details, etc.) This is an unavoidable consequence of high-token bots and I highly recommend using a proxy with a higher context size for a smooth experience. (Maybe one day I'll bite the bullet and figure out lorebooks.)

Art source

Tags: Timekeeper Cookie, Croissant Cookie, String Gummy Cookie, Coffee Candy Cookie, Baguette Cookie, Schneeball Cookie, Marble Bread Cookie, Dark Fondue Cookie, Pain de Campagne Cookie, Maple Taffy Cookie
